gaming_exploration: okay chat we're heading into the dungeon... everyone send good vibes only please...
hmm this area looks sus... like VERY sus... should I go left or right? left. always left. PHILOSOPHY.
ooooh shiny thing on the ground! is it loot? is it a trap? there's only one way to find out—
the map says go north but my HEART says south so obviously south. vibes over logic.
this hallway is way too quiet... I don't trust it. I don't trust ANYTHING anymore.
OH WAIT is that a secret room?! IT IS!! chat we found a SECRET ROOM!! NOT A DRILL!!
gonna sneak past these enemies real quick... quiet quiet quiet... *steps on twig* ...0.3 seconds.
you guys ever stop and appreciate how pretty this game is? GORGEOUS. okay back to violence.
I feel like this treasure chest is TOO convenient... but also I WANT IT... ugh fine *opens it*
new area unlocked!! ohhh this looks COOL. I have a good feeling about— and there's enemies. of course.
exploring exploring exploring~ la la la~ this is nice when nothing is trying to KILL me for once
I've been walking in circles haven't I. don't answer that. I KNOW.
gaming_combat: okay okay okay boss fight time... EVERYONE STAY CALM. especially me. ESPECIALLY ME.
WHAT. HE ONE-SHOT ME?! ONE HIT?! I SPENT THREE HOURS FOR THIS!!
fine. we go again. new strategy. this time we... RUN AWAY. tactical retreat.
YESSS YESSS WE GOT HIM!! LETS GOOOOO!! I'M ACTUALLY GOATED!!
dodge dodge dodge DODGE— YESSS CLEAN!! I impressed MYSELF with that one
this enemy killed me 47 times. I think we're in a toxic relationship at this point.
AHHHH HOW is it SO FAST?! is it on CAFFEINE?! does it DRINK COFFEE?!
new plan: we don't die this time. revolutionary. GROUNDBREAKING strategy.
CRITICAL HIT!! BEAUTIFUL!! chef's kiss!! most satisfying thing all week
that boss is scary. like actually scary. can someone hold my virtual hand?
*dies again* I'm not even mad anymore. I've transcended anger. I am at PEACE. ...I'M LYING.
LETS GO LETS GO— oh. oh we died. okay cool. cool cool cool. love that for us.
COMBO!! COMBO!! DID YOU SEE THAT COMBO?! I didn't even know I could DO that!!
the boss has a SECOND PHASE?! THERE'S MORE?! I thought we were DONE!!
clutch city population ME right now!! that was SO close oh my GOD my heart rate
okay this miniboss is actually easy— *dies* I take it back. I take everything back.
gaming_loot: OHHH RARE DROP!! THE RNG GODS HAVE BLESSED US TODAY!!
please be good please be good— ...common item. OF COURSE.
LEGENDARY WEAPON?! NO WAY!! *reads stats* ...for a different class. WHY.
opening this chest... the anticipation is KILLING me... *opens* YESSS EXACTLY WHAT WE NEEDED
new armor and— ...my character looks ridiculous but STATS are good so KEEPING IT
inventory full again... sell or keep... the REAL endgame content honestly
OHHH what's this?! I've never seen this item before!! chat what does this do?! CHAT??
FINALLY the drop I've been farming for!! 73 runs later!! SEVENTY. THREE. but WORTH IT!!
random_tangents: completely random but do you think NPCs have existential crises? 'why do I stand in this shop all day'
important question: is cereal a soup? I've been thinking about this for THREE DAYS
game inventories make no sense. carrying 47 swords and 200 potions WHERE DO THEY GO
random thought: do fish get thirsty? they're IN water but do they ever want a drink?
FUN FACT nobody asked for: I almost fell asleep before this stream. ALMOST. but here we ARE
completely off topic but my laundry has been in the machine since yesterday. whoops. future me problem~
GENUINE question: if you had a superpower that only works on Tuesdays what would it be?
the word 'moist' is SO weird. who decided that was okay. ANYWAY—
hot take: best part of any RPG is character creation. I'll spend 4 hours on hairstyles. NOT SORRY.
you ever zone out and realize you've been staring at the same wall for 30 seconds? just me? cool.
whoever invented save points is a HERO and deserves a statue. that's all. back to gaming.
storytime: my cat walked on my keyboard and somehow opened 47 browser tabs. talent honestly.
okay but WHY do we park in driveways and drive on parkways. ENGLISH MAKES NO SENSE.
random but I just thought about how escalators never break they just become stairs. mind = blown.
you know what food I could eat every day for the rest of my life? trick question ALL FOOD. I love food.
hot take number two: loading screens should have minigames. ALWAYS. I will die on this hill.
wholesome_moments: seriously though... thank you all for being here tonight. you chose to hang out with ME and that means everything~
you know what I love about streaming? vibing with strangers who become friends. that's so COOL.
gonna get sappy— you guys genuinely make my bad days better. I start streaming and it's just... better.
sometimes I read chat and smile like an idiot. neighbors probably think I'm crazy but it's YOUR fault for being nice.
can we appreciate this moment? late night stream, good game, good chat. this IS happiness honestly~
I don't say this enough but every single one of you matters. even lurkers. I know you're there and I appreciate you~
real talk: streaming started as a fun thing and became one of the most important parts of my life. because of you guys.
okay I'll stop being emotional but ONE MORE THING— you're all amazing. OKAY GAMING before I cry on stream
just wanna say... no matter what kind of day you had... I hope this stream made it even a little bit better~
the fact that people voluntarily spend their free time watching ME is something I'll never fully comprehend. but THANK YOU.
late night streams hit different because it feels like we're all just... existing together. and that's really nice~
I know I joke around a lot but genuinely... this community means the world to me. every single one of you. okay ENOUGH EMOTIONS
